Name: -1_fashion_appreciate_clothing_pleasing
Representative_Docs: ['If I say someone has good taste it means I agree with their sense of style. I think that what they have put together flows well and is cohesive rather than clashes and seems out if place. This applies to fashion and decor. It also might mean they like the same forms of media that I do for the same reasons. Or the same forms of entertainment. It means that I believe that they think similar to me. ', 'When I say they have good taste, it usually means that they tends to appreciate subtle details in the object. For example, a person that have a good taste in fashion would dress in a way that elevate their body features and while the fabric/pattern/fit might be eccentric and different then, it would still go together. ', 'In visual arts I consider good taste to be represented by simple, classic design and understated colors.  In film or literature works that tell a story in a way that allows the reader or viewer to participate in determining the meaning as it pertains to them.  Works that preach or are hyperbolic tend to be in bad taste.  In clothing I prefer simple and classic lines and harmonious colors.']

Name: 0_say_mean_usually_subjective
Representative_Docs: ['I think that it\'s just a knee-jerk phrasing. I usually just mean - when I say that somebody has good taste - that they have a similar taste to me. Like, "Oh! We could get along!". That\'s usually what I mean.', 'When I say that someone has good taste, it means that in my opinion, the things that person likes is similar to what I like, so, therefore, they have good taste.', "Someone has a good taste in something when they're perceived to like something similar to myself. We see 'good taste' in a certain subject as something that we also enjoy. For example, I would say someone has a good taste in food if I perceive that they like similar foods to me. Having a good taste is subjective and aligns closely with my values."]

Name: 1_choices_art_appreciate_look
Representative_Docs: ['Generally it means I agree with their aesthetic choices and they choose things that look good. ', 'That their preference of music, art, clothing, movies, etc. is appealing, interesting, fun, exciting, likeable, good to look at or enjoy, or just appealing in every way.', "They appreciate things like the writing style, colors and shades, and the way they work together. They don't often go for the gaudy or obvious but appreciate the subtleties of art.  "]
